values.description: Base URL of the running backend. Change to your deployed URL (e.g. https://your-service.onrender.com) for production testing.
Public URL to analyze. Use any publicly reachable https:// site.
Expected API version string. Tests assert the response matches this value.
Basic Auth username. Only required when AUTH_ENABLED=1 in your deployment. Leave blank if auth is off (the default).
Basic Auth password. Only required when AUTH_ENABLED=1 in your deployment. Leave blank if auth is off (the default).
